name: Salamangreat Weasel
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>転生炎獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>サラマングレイト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ウィーゼル
desc: If you have 2 or more "Salamangreat" monsters in your GY: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If a "Salamangreat" Ritual, Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link Monster(s) is Special Summoned to your field, while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 other "Salamangreat" monster in your GY; place this card on the bottom of your Deck, and if you do, Special Summon that monster to your opponent's field, then draw 1 card. You can only use each effect of "Salamangreat Weasel" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If you have 2 or more "Salamangreat" monsters in your GY: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If a "Salamangreat" Ritual, Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link Monster(s) is Special Summoned to your field, while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 other "Salamangreat" monster in your GY; place this card on the bottom of your Deck, and if you do, Special Summon that monster to your opponent's field, then draw 1 card. You can only use each effect of "Salamangreat Weasel" once per turn.

You can only use each effect of "Salamangreat Weasel" once per turn.

action: Places itself from the player's Graveyard on the bottom of the Deck
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons from your Graveyard to your opponent's field
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
